headline: Popular food delivery app plans crypto payouts for employees
summary: DoorDash is making its most significant move yet into digital finance. On April 21, Tempo, the payments blockchain backed by Stripe and venture capital firm Paradigm, announced its partnership with DoorDash and others to bring stablecoin-powered payouts to the global marketplace. headline: DoorDash to Pay Delivery Workers in Stablecoins via Stripe's Tempo Blockchain
summary: Delivery firm DoorDash will use Stripe's payments-focused blockchain, Tempo, to pay its Dashers in stablecoins in more than 40 countries.

raw.headline: DoorDash to Pay Delivery Workers in Stablecoins via Stripe's Tempo Blockchain

headline: Mother's Day Brunch, Sorted: DoorDash Spotlights Local Restaurants Offering Delivery, Reservations and Rewards
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 21, 2026--Brunch has become the defining meal of Mother’s Day – but as the ways people celebrate evolve, so do the options available to them. This year, DoorDash is spotlighting the local restaurants that make celebrating easy, whether that’s delivery to your door, securing a coveted reservation, or discovering new restaurants to earn in-store rewards.

headline: Stripe And Paradigm's Tempo Blockchain Valued At $5B Lands DoorDash Partnership
summary: Tempo and DoorDash launch stablecoin payments in 40+ countries, expanding real-world crypto payouts and global merchant flows.

headline: Benzinga, Kalshi, and Fiscal.ai Collaborate to Expand Prediction Markets with Company KPI Data
summary: Benzinga, a leading provider of real-time financial news and market data, today announced a collaboration with Fiscal.ai, a Modern Financial Data Company, and Kalshi, the world's largest prediction market, to support the expansion of prediction markets tied to company performance indicators.
